org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders

类 ConsumerBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders.AbstractBuilder<T,B>
      • org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders.AbstractMethodBuilder<T,B>
        • org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders.AbstractInterfaceBuilder<T,B>
          • org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders.AbstractReferenceBuilder<ConsumerConfig,ConsumerBuilder>
            • org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders.ConsumerBuilder

  • public class ConsumerBuilder
extends AbstractReferenceBuilder<ConsumerConfig,ConsumerBuilder>
    This is a builder for build ConsumerConfig.
    从以下版本开始:
    2.7
